creator: nbe@renzel.net
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #40)

> I also wonder what happens with the test on a non-Ryzen system.

tried that - Intel(R) Xeon(R) CPU E3-1220 v3 @ 3.10GHz - here's the result so far:
